visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A person is seen lying down indoors, holding a white tablet. A circular video inset in the center shows a middle-aged man with glasses and a patterned flat cap speaking. Large yellow and white text overlays appear on the screen. (2) Close-up shots show a hand using a white stylus to interact with various apps and drawings on the tablet screen. The man in the inset continues to speak with active facial expressions. (3) The main character, a man in a brown hoodie, glasses, and a flat cap, is shown in a studio-like setting with soft indoor lighting. He gestures with his hands while speaking directly to the camera. (4) The scene shifts to a child with brown hair reading a physical book with large pages. The lighting is natural and warm. (5) A close-up shows a hand writing with a pen on a paper notebook, emphasizing traditional learning methods. (6) The main character returns to the screen, speaking in front of a neutral grey background. (7) A close-up of a smartphone screen shows a website, and then another person is seen using a smartphone in a dimly lit room. (8) More close-ups of a book being flipped through rapidly, showing the texture of the paper. (9) The video concludes with the main character posing a question, pointing his finger towards the camera for emphasis.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 真的可以幫到學生學習嗎. [Logo]: f 3c 有意思 tim 哥. [Slogan]: 使用平板筆電做教學. [Logo]: miko. (2) [Subtitle]: 採用平板、筆電等 3C 商品搭配教學, 是近幾年教育趨勢. (3) [Subtitle]: 但在芬蘭一處小鎮, 卻反其道而行. (4) [Subtitle]: 重回紙本書籍以及筆記本上課. (5) [Subtitle]: 當地老師跟學生認為, 使用數位教材及設備在搜集資料上是有很大的幫助. [Slogan]: 但會干擾學生的注意力. (6) [Subtitle]: 而且會加重使用 3C 產品的眼睛疲勞度. (7) [Subtitle]: 有多項研究指出說, 長時間使用觸控螢幕. [Slogan]: 長時間使用觸控螢幕. (8) [Subtitle]: 容易造成專注力下降, 甚至有焦慮還有睡眠障礙等問題. [Slogan]: 容易造成專注力下降. [Slogan]: 以及焦慮 睡眠障礙等問題. (9) [Subtitle]: 反而回歸紙本書籍啊, 更可以提升學習的效率. [Slogan]: 反而回歸紙本書籍. (10) [Subtitle]: 目前芬蘭政府也打算擬定新法, 限制學生在上課時使用個人手機等數位設備. [Slogan]: 擬定新法. (11) [Subtitle]: 那你對於數位教學你怎麼看.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 child reading a book, 1 student using a phone.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing a brown hoodie, glasses, and a grey/brown patterned flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean studio background with soft lighting for the presenter; a cozy home environment for the child and the student shots.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks clearly and narratively, asking a question about student learning. A light, upbeat acoustic guitar track begins as BGM. (2) The speaker describes current trends in education, emphasizing the use of tablets. The BGM remains steady with a light rhythmic beat. (3) The tone shifts slightly to introduce a contrasting case in Finland. (4) Short whoosh-like transition sound effects are audible as text pops up on screen. (5) The speaker lists concerns from teachers regarding digital devices, including distractions and eye fatigue. His voice is firm but friendly. (6) A ding sound effect punctuates the mention of research findings. (7) The music continues at a consistent tempo as the speaker explains the return to physical books. (8) The video ends with a concluding question, the BGM fading out softly as the voice rises in pitch for the question.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Context -> Counter-Trend -> Evidence -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To comment on the educational trend in Finland of moving back to traditional physical books to combat the negative side effects of excessive digital device use among students.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: A logo for 'miko' is displayed at the top left throughout the video, and the social media handles for '3c 有意思 tim 哥' are shown.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a social-media native editing style with heavy text overlays and a picture-in-picture format to deliver educational commentary efficiently.
